title: Locomotive For Murder The Improvised Whodunnit
description: Welcome aboard Locomotive for Murder: The Improvised Whodunnit, the totally improvised, totally hilarious murder mystery, where killing the cast and cracking the case is in your hands! Offie-nominated Edinburgh Fringe favourites, Pinch Punch, are bringing their five-star, sell-out show back to Brighton Fringe for a fifth year running! So, don your deerstalkers and oil your moustaches for a night of shaky alibis, silver-tongued sleuths, thrills, spills, and good old-fashioned kills. Four characters board a train, but not everyone will survive... Luckily, a world-famous detective is on board, ready to root out the killer. But who is the murderer? Only one person knows—the murderer themselves! Can you put your wits to the test and solve the case? Using real-life audience stories and suggestions, watch Pinch Punch create a unique, one-of-a-kind, never-to-be-repeated whodunnit. If you love comedy or murder mysteries, then this is the show for you!
content_warnings: Due to the improvised nature of the performance, we cannot issue specific content warnings

venue.name: Brighton Open Air Theatre (BOAT)
venue.address: Dyke Road Park, Dyke Road, East Sussex

reviews.reviewer: By Reviewer Upload May 23, 2023 No Comments 3 Mins Read
reviews.excerpt: Creators and performers: Pinch Punch A well-worked, confident genre piece,Locomotive For Murdercaptivates its audience with a masterful showcase of how to build a 1920s murder mystery, all made up on the spot.
